classes.description: Adds styling for potentially dangerous actions.
Child of .s-modal. Creates a container that holds the modal dialog with proper padding and shadows.
Child of .s-modal--dialog.Makes the container take up as much of the screen as possible.
Child of .s-modal--dialog. Adds proper styling to the modal dialog’s header.
Child of .s-modal--dialog. Adds proper styling to the modal dialog’s body text.
Child of .s-modal--dialog. Adds the desired spacing to the row of button actions.
Child of .s-modal--dialog. Used to dismiss a modal.
